headline: 3 Bank Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: Banks serve as the backbone of the economy, facilitating lending, deposits, and financial services that keep businesses and consumers moving forward. But concerns about loan losses and tightening regulations have tempered enthusiasm, limiting the banking industry’s gains to 7.5% over the past six months. This return lagged the S&P 500’s 10% climb.
